states.name: Zhuge Liang
states.title: Raging Dragon
states.description: Zhuge Liang was born into a prestigious family. However, at the time, the ruling elite used the pretext of national survival and prosperity to oppress tribal and minority groups. As a child, Zhuge Liang dedicated herself to both scholarly pursuits and martial training—but deep in her heart, she harbored quiet doubts about the injustice surrounding her.

states.name: Zhuge Liang
states.title: Raging Dragon
states.description: In time, Zhuge Liang happened upon irrefutable evidence of large-scale corruption involving high-ranking government officials. Driven by her sense of justice, she resolved to reveal the truth. Yet, due to a political conspiracy, she was branded a traitor, accused of plotting to overthrow the state, and was forced to flee for her life. After exposing the truth to the people, she escaped, eventually crossing the sea and arriving on this continent.

states.name: Zhuge Liang
states.title: Raging Dragon
states.description: A remote town became her second home and there she met new allies, founding a vigilante group. As rumors of her deeds spread, powerful warriors gathered from across the land. The group grew, eventually becoming the Silver Knights—a symbol of justice and hope. For a brief moment, Zhuge Liang found happiness. But that peace would soon be threatened by the looming shadow of Bergaria.
